name: Eita Semi
description: __Height:__ 179.5 cm (5' 10.7") __Hometown:__ Miyagi Prefecture Eita Semi is a third year setter in Shiratorizawa Academy. Like most members of the Shiratorizawa Boys' Volleyball Team, Semi got into the school through a sports scholarship. He was a famous setter during his time at middle school and the main setter for Shiratorizawa before being replaced by Shirabu.

name: Teto Kasane
description: __Height:__ 157.5cm Teto is a 31-year-old chimera girl who was born as a joke from NicoNicoDouga forum users. She loves eating baguettes, and she has a close relation with Ted Kasane and Ruko Yowane. Depicted as more innocent than Miku Hatsune is, Teto is cheerful and eager - though may be naughty at times - perhaps inspired by her mischievous roots from Doraemon. Depicted also as a Tsundere, but to more gentler extent. She gets very angry or sad if someone has bread and does not share with her.

name: Dot Barrett
description: __Affiliation:__ Easton Magic Academy __Occupation:__ Student Dot Barrett is a first-year student at Easton Magic Academy and one of the main characters of the Mashle series. Dot is hot-blooded and obnoxious, however, deep down, he's a nice guy and will apologize if he's wrong about something. He also is shown to fall in love easily.
